text.value: Contact ID of the logged in user
Facility ID for the parent user
Name of the logged in user
Check the chlorine level in the water
To be answered by the CHV
Is there feces around the house?
Storing Feces in a Designated Pit Within the Household Area
Transporting and Treating Feces Outside the Area
How is feces stored or disposed of?
Is there feces on the floor, walls, or toilet hole?
Does the household have a functional toilet?
Does your house have a wastewater fee?
Does the household have a special container for storing drinking water?
Bottled Water or Water Brought from a Safe Source
To be answered by the CHV
Is there privacy in the toilet?
Is there soap at the handwashing station?
Have water treatment tablets been provided?
To be answered by the CHV
Specify the type of soap at the handwashing station.
The count should be greater than zero
Number of water treatment tablets (Water Guard/Aquatab) provided
To be answered by the CHV
If the water source is outside your area, how much time do you spend getting water?
If it is a shared toilet, is it used by more than five households?
Is the toilet shared by more than one household?
To be answered by the CHV
Do you use any method to treat the water?
Is there water available for handwashing?
Outside the Area of the House You Live In
Within the Surrounding Area of the House
Ask about the location of the water
To be answered by the CHV
Treating Water with Chlorine (Water Guard / Aquatab)
Treating Water Using a Special Filter
Ask about the methods used to treat water
Chunguza kiwango cha klorini katika maji
Uhifadhi wa kinyesi katika shimo maalum eneo la nyumba
Kusafirisha kinyesi na kutibu nje ya eneo
Kinyesi kinahifadhiwa au kutupwa kwa njia gani?
Je kuna kinyesi kwenye sakafu, ukuta au tundu la choo?
Je ipo sehemu ya kunawa mikono?
Je nyumba yako ina karo ya maji machafu?
Je kaya ina chombo maalum cha kuhifadhia maji ya kunywa?
Maji ya chupa au yale yaliyoletwa kutoka chanzo salama
Je kuna sabuni katika sehemu ya kunawa mikono?
Je dawa za kutibu maji zimetolewa ?
Ainisha sabuni katika sehemu ya kunawa mikono
Idadi ya vidonge vya dawa za water guard / aquatab zilizotolewa
Unatumia mda gani kufika eneo la maji yanapopatikana?
Kama ni choo cha kuchangia, kinatumika na zaidi ya kaya tano?
Je choo kinatumika na zaidi ya kaya moja ?
Maji juu ya ardhi ya Chemchem zisizohifadhiwa
Je kuna njia yoyote mnatumia kutibu maji?
Je kuna maji katika sehemu ya kunawa mikono?
Nje ya eneo la nyumba unayoishi
Ndani ya eneo la kuzunguka nyumba
Chagua hali ya chanzo cha maji
Kutibu maji kwa kuweka klorini (Water guard / Aquatab)
Kutibu maji kwa kutumia chujio maalum la filta/kuchujia
Je ni njia gani mnazotumia kutibu maji?

bind.relevant: selected( /wash/wash/have_functional_toilet ,"yes") and selected( /wash/wash/water_for_handwash ,"yes") and selected( /wash/wash/handwash_area ,"yes") and selected( /wash/wash/is_soap_available ,"yes")
